root-question.text: Does the task need tools (external data, side effects, code execution)?

branch.conclusion: CoT on raw SDK. No tools, no loop.

question.text: Is step_count > 5 OR is there branching?
Does the team have working experience with LangGraph?

branch.conclusion: Plan-and-Execute hand-rolled on raw SDK — avoid an unfamiliar framework.

question.text: Is the task coding/devops on a CLI surface?

branch.conclusion: Use Claude Code headless — battle-tested, no custom harness needed.
ReAct on raw SDK. Smallest viable shape.

example.p: needs_tools=true → needs_planning=false (4 steps, no branching) → cli_surface=false → conclusion: ReAct on raw SDK.
